name_en: Top-tier Original M47031 Recalls the classic Cite bag design from the 1980s, defining this HangOn bag with a rich retro vibe. Monogram canvas and WN trim shape a modern bowling bag silhouette, while the lock and nameplate add a brand signature. Zipper closure and adjustable shoulder strap offer flexible carrying. Dimensions: 26 × 11.5 × 6.5 cm
